positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a wandering constellation map, forming a cohesive, circular mandala composition. The map uses geometric lines connecting celestial bodies like crescent moons, stylized planets, and shooting stars. The style is clean, linocut etching combined with cosmic watercolor washes, utilizing deep indigo, muted gold, and ethereal silver accents. The composition must be centered, featuring strong contrasts between the intricate black-and-white lines and the subtle, gradient cosmic background. Perfect for a repeating apparel pattern or a central, high-contrast print on a garment. Isolated on a clean, off-white background for easy layering.
